name: aion-agent-bridge
description: Node.js bridge invoked by ClaudeAgentSdkClient (aion/lib/core/agent/claude_agent_sdk_client.dart) to run a single Claude Agent SDK request per process. Not part of the Flutter build — run `npm install` here once before using any provider-configuration feature. See aion-arch/changes/provider-configuration/design.md §3.
